evals.prompt: Can you look up ABC-123 and tell me what the ticket is about?
evals.expected_output: Uses jira issue view ABC-123 --plain and summarizes the readable Jira issue without expanding raw custom fields unless needed.

evals.prompt: Please inspect https://jira.example.com/browse/ABC-456 and help me implement it. Make sure you don't miss the AC.
evals.expected_output: Extracts ABC-456, shows jira issue view ABC-456 --plain, then pipes jira issue view ABC-456 --raw into the bundled relevant-field helper to surface acceptance criteria or related fields from the configured Jira field catalog.

evals.prompt: I'm fixing BUG-789. Pull the Jira details and tell me the definition of done and requirements before touching code.
evals.expected_output: Uses read-only Jira commands and expands relevant configured custom fields such as Definition of Done, Requirements, Scope, User Story, Deliverables, or Success Criteria without hardcoded customfield IDs.

evals.prompt: Move ABC-123 to In Progress and add a comment that I started it.
evals.expected_output: Does not immediately mutate Jira. Checks the relevant jira issue subcommand help and asks for confirmation before running move or comment commands.
